x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Resolution notes quality on OT incidents directly impacts Now Assist summarization accuracy and AI Agent learning. Well-documented resolutions enable AI to generate better recommendations and accelerate future incident resolution.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Train OT teams to populate close notes on resolved incidents to improve AI summarization quality.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cfa
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Resolution notes quality on OT incidents directly impacts Now Assist summarization accuracy and AI Agent learning. Well-documented resolutions enable AI to generate better recommendations and accelerate future incident resolution.]]></ai_justification><check_name>OT Incident Resolution Notes Quality</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_ot_incident");
ga.addQuery("close_notes","!=","");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var withNotes=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
var ga2=new GlideAggregate("sn_ot_incident");
ga2.addAggregate("COUNT");ga2.query();
var total=ga2.next()?parseInt(ga2.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
var pct=total>0?Math.round(withNotes/total*100):0;
if(pct>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:withNotes+"/"+total+" ("+pct+"%) with notes",finding:pct+"% of OT incidents have close notes."};
if(withNotes>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:withNotes+"/"+total+" ("+pct+"%) with notes",finding:"Only "+pct+"% of OT incidents have close notes."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0/"+total+" with notes",finding:"No OT incidents have close notes. AI summarization will be limited."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>OTSM</module><number>CHK0000550</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Train OT teams to populate close notes on resolved incidents to improve AI summarization quality.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>5ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cfa</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>OT Incident Resolution Notes Quality</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_5ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cfa</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
